_comment: Hand-rolled clinicalmem v0.0.1 fixture summary (2026-05-03). Computed by inspecting engine/*.py with ast: 21 modules, 174 functions + 52 classes = 226 symbols, 17 internal import edges (100% intra-package, no cycles), 21/21 pure modules, 483 decision points, 68 evidence-pattern calls. mcp_server/server.py registers 18 @mcp.tool() decorators. sum_protected_decls=0 because clinicalmem is Python — [protection] markers are MIND-only and not applicable here; we exclude governance_kernel_coverage from the rules profile rather than failing it on a profile mismatch. Replace with the Phase D tree-sitter sidecar's automated rollup when shipped.
